base_predictor.target: y = log1p(trans_effect_magnitude)  [L2 norm of zscore vector EXCLUDING perturbed gene; leakage-safe]

confound_controls.a_n_cells_alone_auroc: score = gene-level max(log_n_cells); AUROC vs de_max>=10
confound_controls.b_log_baseMean_alone_auroc: score = gene-level max(log_baseMean); AUROC vs de_max>=10
confound_controls.c_depth_stratified_auroc: predictor-score AUROC within quartiles of gene-level max(n_cells); WIN requires AUROC>0.5 to persist within quartiles
confound_controls.d_partial_spearman: partial Spearman(gene_score, de_max | log_n_cells); WIN requires it to stay positive
confound_controls.survival_rule: effect SURVIVES depth control iff depth-stratified AUROC remains >0.5 across quartiles AND partial Spearman remains positive

data.h5ad: data/raw/GWCD4i.DE_stats.h5ad (33983 contrasts=11526 genes x 3 conditions; var 10282 genes)
data.h5mu: data/raw/GWCD4i.DE_stats.by_donors.h5mu (6 donor-pair modalities from 4 donors CE0006864,CE0008162,CE0008678,CE0010866)
data.labels: data/interim/leverA_obs_labels.parquet (n_total_de_genes per row, extracted from obs)

honesty_contract: prereg frozen (sha256) BEFORE scoring; timestamp EXCLUDED from hash; effect must SURVIVE depth control to count as a win; per-donor LODO reported honestly (n=4); no fabrication; negatives reported plainly; this validates WITHIN-ASSAY recalibration, NOT frozen transfer to a new assay.

leave_condition_out.design: train base predictor on TRAIN-fold genes Rest+Stim8hr rows; test on TEST-fold genes Stim48hr rows (condition- AND gene-disjoint)
leave_condition_out.metric: AUROC of predicted y vs (row n_total_de_genes>=10) on held-out Stim48hr test rows

lodo_4donor.caveat: n=4 donors is small; effect-separation rows are NOT gene-disjoint across folds (donor-generalization test, not gene-generalization)
lodo_4donor.design: for each held-out donor d: calib = 3 donor-pairs NOT containing d, test = 3 pairs containing d (conformal.py run_lodo design)
lodo_4donor.report: per-donor conformal coverage @ 80/90/95 AND row-level AUROC of predicted y vs (row n_total_de_genes>=10) on held-out donor

primary.gene_score: max over the gene's conditions of predicted y (matched to de_max = max over conditions of n_total_de_genes)
primary.label: de_max = max_{conditions} n_total_de_genes; positive iff de_max>=10
primary.metric: AUROC of base-predictor score separating de_max>=10 (real transcriptional effect) on gene-disjoint TEST genes
primary.perm_p: 2000x label-permutation (shuffle de_max>=10 among test genes), one-sided p = fraction perm AUROC >= observed
primary.test_positive_rate_note: computed at scoring; overall gene-level rate observed ~0.346 (seen during label extraction; not tuned)

purpose: Test whether re-fitting the base predictor + conformal layer WITHIN the Zhu assay converts the frozen external null (AUROC 0.465) into a real positive on gene-disjoint held-out data. Validates within-assay recalibration, NOT frozen transfer to a new assay.

secondary.conformal_coverage: row-level on TEST rows @ nominal 0.80/0.90/0.95; split-conformal fit on CALIB residuals |y-pred|, quantile(level, method='higher'); ALSO report CQR coverage

splits.scheme: gene-disjoint train/calib/test; all 3 conditions of a gene kept TOGETHER in one fold (no Rest/Stim leakage)

success_criterion_a_priori.note: BOTH must hold for a positive. A 'win' ADDITIONALLY requires the effect to SURVIVE depth control (below).

title: Lever A — pre-registered within-assay recalibration of base predictor + conformal layer on Zhu 2025 CD4+ Perturb-seq
